author: Ciprian-Florin Ifrim
name: 73.7M Ternary U-Net — BitNet b1.58 + NeoMuon + 4x relu² MLP + FP8 QAT + Base-3 LZMA
blurb: 10L 768d ternary U-Net transformer with relu² 4x MLP, factored tied embedding (254-dim), FP8 QAT, poly5 softcap, YaRN 2048, NeoMuon optimizer (3 Newton-Schulz steps), base-3+LZMA compression. Sliding eval stride=16 with temperature scaling T=0.90. 3-seed mean 1.1570 bpb (std 0.0007).
